shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style. {Stepmother} in a dark purple tunic with mean eyes and {Cam} in a bright pink silk shirt hide behind a banana tree, spying on {Tam} who is visible near {Mossy Well}.
shot.motion_prompt: Subtle camera drift to the left as {Stepmother} and {Cam} whisper and look towards {Tam} by {Mossy Well}.

shot.title: Stepmother Confronts Tam
shot.description: At {Tam's House & Bedroom}, camera angle from the side, {Stepmother} stands tall and holds the {Wooden Staff} with a cold, demanding expression as she addresses {Tam}.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style, cozy and warm morning light inside {Tam's House & Bedroom}, rustic wooden interior with clay pots, {Stepmother} in a dark purple tunic looking down, {Tam} in her faded brown áo tứ thân sitting on a small stool.
shot.motion_prompt: Slow pan to the right, showing {Stepmother} extending her arm to offer the heavy {Wooden Staff} to {Tam}.

shot.title: Tam Receives the Staff
shot.description: At {Tam's House & Bedroom}, camera angle close-up, {Tam} reaches out her small hands to accept the heavy {Wooden Staff} from {Stepmother}.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style, close-up shot of the interaction, {Tam}'s hands taking the rustic {Wooden Staff} from the harsh grip of {Stepmother}, soft indoor shadows, warm highlights.
shot.motion_prompt: Static shot focusing on the hand-off of the {Wooden Staff} from {Stepmother} to {Tam}, with a subtle shake as {Tam} takes its weight.

shot.title: Stepmother Orders Tam to the Mountains
shot.description: At {Tam's House & Bedroom}, camera angle from behind {Tam}, {Stepmother} points a finger sharply towards the outside fields, giving her strict command.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style, composition showing {Tam} from behind holding the {Wooden Staff}, looking small compared to {Stepmother} who stands over her, pointing towards the open doorway of {Tam's House & Bedroom} where bright green village fields are visible.
shot.motion_prompt: Slow zoom out as {Stepmother} speaks with an angry gesture, and {Tam} holds the {Wooden Staff} tightly and nods her head sadly.

shot.title: Tam Arrives at the Well
shot.description: At {Mossy Well}, camera angle from the front, {Tam} runs towards the well under the dimming dusk sky.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style. Under a dusky sky with soft warm gradients, the tired and dirty {Tam} in her faded brown áo tứ thân runs towards the mossy stone structure of the {Mossy Well} surrounded by banana trees. Medium shot, soft focus on background.
shot.motion_prompt: The camera pans right slowly following {Tam} as she runs and stops, leaning over the mossy stone of the {Mossy Well}.

shot.title: Calling the Bống Fish
shot.description: At {Mossy Well}, camera angle looking down, {Tam} leans over the mossy stone rim, calling out into the dark water.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style. A close-up of {Tam} leaning over the {Mossy Well}. Her large eyes are filled with anxiety. The water reflection shows her face, with dim dusk light highlighting the mossy stone texture.
shot.motion_prompt: The camera tilts down slightly as {Tam} speaks and peers deeper into the dark waters of the {Mossy Well}.

shot.title: A Patch of Blood
shot.description: At {Mossy Well}, camera angle looking straight down, a small patch of red blood floats on the dark water instead of the {Bống Fish}.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style. Looking down into the dark water of the {Mossy Well}, a small, glowing crimson patch of blood ripples on the surface. There is no sign of the tiny red-finned {Bống Fish}.
shot.motion_prompt: The camera slowly zooms in on the rippling patch of red blood floating inside the dark well of the {Mossy Well}.

shot.title: Tam Sobbing
shot.description: At {Mossy Well}, camera angle from the ground, {Tam} falls to her knees, burying her face in her hands and sobbing.
shot.visual_prompt: Chibi ghibli style. {Tam} is on her knees on the grassy ground next to the {Mossy Well}. Her shoulders shake as she weeps, tears streaming down her dusty face. The dusky background light is soft and somber.
shot.motion_prompt: The camera holds static as {Tam} trembles and weeps, clutching her knees next to the {Mossy Well}.

shot.title: Buddha Appears
